title: Wire non-empty Chat Workflows context strategy UI
depends_on: T017: empty/new composer Workflows launch wired
T022: desktop linked workflow start API/types added
objective: Add non-empty normal chat Workflows flow with explicit inherit/summarize/clear strategy, linked-start API call, target session navigation, active source disablement, and actionable errors.
expected_outputs: desktop/src/stores/sessionStore.ts （修改，如 navigation state requires it）
anti_goals: Do not start workflow mode without explicit context strategy.
Do not clear or overwrite source chat UI on failure.
Do not silently substitute strategy on summarize failure.
Do not regress existing composer menu behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Non-empty normal chats show strategy dialog before linked start.
Successful start opens/connects returned workflow session.
Active streaming state disables or surfaces 409.
Failures keep source chat unchanged and show actionable message.
